meta.title: Rohit Gurunath Thakur — Senior Software Engineer
meta.description: Senior Software Engineer specializing in distributed systems, high-throughput backend engineering, and financial-grade transaction infrastructure. Core contributor to India's CBDC and UPI ecosystem.

hero.name: Rohit Gurunath Thakur
hero.title: Senior Software Engineer — Distributed Systems
hero.tagline: I architect transaction engines sustaining 6,000 TPS with 99.9% availability. Core contributor to India's CBDC and UPI ecosystem, building financial-grade systems that process millions of transactions monthly.

about.heading: About Me
paragraphs: I'm a Senior Software Engineer with 4 years of deep experience designing and building high-throughput distributed backend systems in the payments domain. My work sits at the core of India's digital currency infrastructure — from CBDC transaction engines to UPI interoperability layers.

I specialize in architecting systems where failure is not an option: idempotent transaction pipelines, distributed ledger reconciliation, and batch frameworks processing INR 20+ Crore monthly. Every system I build is designed for financial-grade integrity and massive scale.

My approach combines rigorous systems thinking with battle-tested production debugging. I've led root-cause analysis for critical incidents, optimized database queries under peak load, and designed Kafka-based event architectures that maintain strict ordering at high throughput.

highlights.title: Scale-First Thinking
highlights.text: Every system I design starts with the question: what happens at 10x load? I build for scale from day one.

highlights.title: Financial-Grade Integrity
highlights.text: Idempotency, replay protection, ledger reconciliation — I ensure every rupee is accounted for across distributed services.

highlights.title: Production Battle-Tested
highlights.text: From root-cause analysis to performance tuning, I thrive in high-stakes production environments where uptime is everything.

items.title: CBDC Transaction Engine
items.subtitle: Central Bank Digital Currency infrastructure
items.description: Core contributor to India's sovereign digital currency platform — a high-throughput transaction processing engine supporting wallet lifecycle, programmable tokens, and distributed ledger reconciliation.
items.problem: India needed a scalable, secure digital currency infrastructure that could handle millions of transactions with strict financial integrity, programmable token controls, and real-time settlement.
items.solution: Designed and implemented wallet lifecycle APIs (issuance, transfer, redemption) in a distributed microservices architecture. Built idempotency using unique request identifiers and replay protection. Optimized PostgreSQL indexing strategies for peak-load performance.
items.impact: Achieved 6,000 TPS sustained throughput with 99.9% system availability. Ensured ledger consistency across all distributed services through automated reconciliation mechanisms.

items.title: Batch Disbursement Engine
items.subtitle: Large-scale wallet crediting framework
items.description: Built a scalable batch processing framework that credits 100,000+ wallets within 30 minutes, processing INR 20+ Crore in monthly token disbursements with full transactional safety.
items.problem: Mass crediting of digital currency to hundreds of thousands of wallets required a system that could guarantee zero data loss, handle failures gracefully, and reconcile every transaction — all within tight SLA windows.
items.solution: Developed a Spring Batch framework with retry logic, failure recovery workflows, and reconciliation checkpoints. Designed rule-based programmable token controls for targeted distribution use cases.
items.impact: Credits 100K+ wallets in under 30 minutes. Processes INR 20+ Crore monthly with transactional safety guarantees. Zero reconciliation discrepancies since launch.

items.title: CBDC–UPI Interoperability
items.subtitle: Bridging digital currency with 50M+ QR points
items.description: Built the interoperability layer connecting CBDC to India's UPI ecosystem, enabling digital rupee transactions at over 50 million QR acceptance points nationwide.
items.problem: For CBDC adoption, digital currency needed to be spendable at existing UPI merchant points. This required seamless integration with India's massive payment acceptance network without disrupting existing flows.
items.solution: Designed and built the CBDC–UPI bridge layer. Developed EMI (BNPL) conversion and credit authorization flows for RuPay credit-on-UPI. Implemented fund block and release APIs for settlement workflows.
items.impact: Enabled CBDC transactions at 50M+ UPI QR acceptance points. Successfully integrated RuPay credit-on-UPI flows for EMI and BNPL use cases.

items.title: Event-Driven Transaction Pipeline
items.subtitle: Kafka-based async processing architecture
items.description: Designed Kafka-based asynchronous workflows with partition-aware processing to maintain strict ordering and high throughput for financial transaction events.
items.problem: Synchronous transaction processing created bottlenecks under peak load. The system needed to decouple producers and consumers while guaranteeing message ordering for financial events — where out-of-order processing means incorrect balances.
items.solution: Architected partition-aware Kafka consumers with exactly-once semantics. Built dead-letter queue handling, monitoring dashboards, and automated alerting for consumer lag.
items.impact: Eliminated synchronous bottlenecks, enabling the system to sustain 6,000 TPS. Maintained strict ordering guarantees with zero message loss in production.

achievements: Architected transaction processing engine sustaining 6,000 TPS with 99.9% system availability for India's CBDC platform
Designed and implemented wallet lifecycle APIs (issuance, transfer, redemption) in a distributed microservices architecture
Built scalable batch framework crediting 100,000+ wallets within 30 minutes, processing INR 20+ Crore monthly
Implemented idempotency using unique request identifiers and replay protection to prevent duplicate monetary operations
Designed Kafka-based async workflows with partition-aware processing maintaining strict ordering at high throughput
Built CBDC–UPI interoperability layer integrating with 50M+ QR acceptance points across India
Developed EMI (BNPL) conversion and credit authorization flows for RuPay credit-on-UPI
Optimized PostgreSQL queries and indexing strategies to reduce transaction latency under peak load
Led root-cause analysis and performance tuning for production incidents in high-stakes environments

items.institution: Shivajirao S. Jondhale College of Engineering
